summary: Phase 20 backend testing across all 4 new tracks (UI Registry, Workflows, Hosting, Runner) plus regression. 22/22 pytest cases passed against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: workflow_service.start_workflow has a dead-code pattern: `await COL.update_one(...) if False else None` (line ~342). Harmless but should be removed for clarity.
routes/workflows.py /start does not validate that prompt is non-empty (Pydantic only requires presence). Consider min_length=1.
routes/runner.py self-heal SSE catches all exceptions but emits the message inline; consider also logging server-side for observability (currently relies on caller).
routes/hosting.py cf_connect length check is len<20 — magic number; consider a named constant.
ui_registry.py uses a module-level _CACHE dict; if registry JSON is hot-edited it will not reload until process restart (acceptable for prod, document it).
workflow cancel endpoint returns 400 on already-terminal workflows — that's fine, but the response body is just a generic message; clients can't distinguish 'not found' vs 'already terminal'.
seed_data_creation: Tests create a fresh project per-session via POST /api/projects with name prefix 'TEST_phase20_'. No persistent cleanup; trivial test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Phase 20 backend suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_phase20_four_tracks.py and covers: UI registry (6 packs/17 blocks, kind+pack filters, directive, block-by-id 200/404), workflow lifecycle (start->poll->resume->complete + cancel + 404), hosting (readiness, Caddy generate w/HSTS+compose, install-guide, CF status default-disconnected, CF connect short/long invalid tokens), runner (config mode=subprocess, quick-build, self-heal SSE first event with max_attempts=1), and regression on /system/ready, /auth/login, /scaffolds (>=10), /ai/providers (8). All 22 pass in ~6s.
